% After Fact.dax:
DIVIDE(
CALCULATE(
COUNTROWS('Fact Procurement'),
'Fact Procurement'[PO_Date] > 'Fact Procurement'[Invoice_Document_Date]
),
COUNTROWS('Fact Procurement')
)

% PO After Invoice.dax:
DIVIDE(
CALCULATE(
COUNTROWS('Fact Procurement'),
'Fact Procurement'[PO_Date] > 'Fact Procurement'[Invoice_Document_Date]
),
COUNTROWS('Fact Procurement')
)

After Fact POs by BU_cy.dax: CALCULATE([After Fact POs by BU],Time_intelligence[Name]="Current Period")

Average Lead Time (Days).dax:
```
AVERAGEX (
'Bridge PO item',
VAR _PODate = CALCULATE ( MIN ( 'Fact Procurement'[PO_date] ) )
VAR _GRDate = CALCULATE ( MAX ( Goods_Receipt[GR_posting_date] ) )
RETURN
IF (
NOT ISBLANK ( _PODate ) && NOT ISBLANK ( _GRDate ),
DATEDIFF ( _PODate, _GRDate, DAY ),
BLANK()
)
)
```

Base_spend.dax:
var a=SELECTEDVALUE('Parameter Currency Switch'[Parameter_currency Order])
RETURN SWITCH(a,
0,sum('Fact Procurement'[InvoiceAmountInUSD]),
1,sum('Fact Procurement'[InvoiceAmtInCCC]),
2,sum('Fact Procurement'[InvoiceAmtInTC]))

HHI.dax:
VAR a =
ADDCOLUMNS(
VALUES(Supplier[Vendor_ID]),
"share",CALCULATE(DIVIDE([Spend_cy],CALCULATE([Spend_cy],REMOVEFILTERS(Supplier[Vendor_ID])))))
RETURN
SUMX(a, [share] * [share])

HHI Interpretation.dax:
VAR h = ROUND([HHI],2)
RETURN
SWITCH(
TRUE(),
h < 0.15, "Low concentration (HHI < 0.15)",
h < 0.25, "Moderate concentration (0.15–0.25)",
h <= 0.40, "High concentration (0.25–0.40)",
h <= 0.60, "Very high dependency (0.40–0.60)",
h < 1, "Near single-source risk (0.60–1)",
"Pure single supplier"
)

var spend=[USD_Cumulative_Spend_item%]

return r

Impact%.dax:

"Volume Effect",[% Spend Variance due to Volume Effect],

Lead Time Variance %.dax:
```
AVERAGEX (
'Bridge PO item',
VAR _PODate = CALCULATE ( MIN ( 'Fact Procurement'[PO_date] ) )
VAR _GRDate = CALCULATE ( MAX ( Goods_Receipt[GR_posting_date] ) )
VAR _ContractedDate = CALCULATE ( MAX ( 'Delivery Schedule'[delivery_date] ) )
VAR _ActualDeliveryDays = DATEDIFF ( _PODate, _GRDate, DAY )
VAR _ContractedLeadTime = DATEDIFF ( _PODate, _ContractedDate, DAY )
RETURN
IF (
NOT ISBLANK ( _ActualDeliveryDays ) && NOT ISBLANK ( _ContractedLeadTime ),
DIVIDE (
_ActualDeliveryDays - _ContractedLeadTime,
_ContractedLeadTime
),
BLANK()
)
)
```

Lead Time Volatility (Days).dax:
VAR LeadTimes =
FILTER (
ADDCOLUMNS (
'Bridge PO item',
"LeadTime",
VAR _PODate = CALCULATE ( MIN ( 'Fact Procurement'[PO_date] ) )
VAR _GRDate = CALCULATE ( MAX ( Goods_Receipt[GR_posting_date] ) )
RETURN
IF (
NOT ISBLANK ( _PODate ) &&
NOT ISBLANK ( _GRDate ),
DATEDIFF ( _PODate, _GRDate, DAY )
)
),
NOT ISBLANK ( [LeadTime] )
)
RETURN
IF (
COUNTROWS ( LeadTimes ) < 2,
BLANK(),    -- or 0
STDEVX.S ( LeadTimes, [LeadTime] )
)

OTIF_Flag.dax:
VAR OrderedQty =[scheduled_qty_cy]
VAR DeliveredQty =[Gr_quantity_cy]
VAR ReqDate =[scheduled_max_date]
VAR ActualDate =[GR_max_date]
RETURN
IF(
DeliveredQty >= OrderedQty &&
ActualDate <= ReqDate && not ISBLANK(ActualDate) && not ISBLANK(ReqDate) && NOT ISBLANK(max('Fact Procurement'[DeliveryCompletedInd])),
1,
0
)

Period Note CY.dax:
VAR _Period = SELECTEDVALUE('Duration Parameter'[Period])
VAR _MaxDate = MAX(Calendar[Date])
VAR _MinDate = MIN(Calendar[Date])
-- Current Period
VAR _CurrStart =
SWITCH(
_Period,
"YTD", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate),1,1),
"L12M", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-13)+1,
"MOM", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-1)+1,
"Date-Filter", _MinDate
)
VAR _CurrEnd =
SWITCH(
_Period,
"L12M", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-1),
_MaxDate
)
-- Previous Period
VAR _PrevStart =
SWITCH(
_Period,
"YTD", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate)-1,1,1),
"L12M", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-25)+1,
"MOM", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-2)+1,
"Date-Filter", DATE(YEAR(_MinDate)-1, MONTH(_MinDate), DAY(_MinDate))
)
VAR _PrevEnd =
SWITCH(
_Period,
"YTD", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate)-1, MONTH(_MaxDate), DAY(_MaxDate)),
"L12M", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-13),
"MOM", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-1),
"Date-Filter", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate)-1, MONTH(_MaxDate), DAY(_MaxDate))
)
RETURN
"Current Period: "
& FORMAT(_CurrStart,"MMM YYYY")
& " - "
& FORMAT(_CurrEnd,"MMM YYYY")

Period Note PY.dax:
VAR _Period = SELECTEDVALUE('Duration Parameter'[Period])
VAR _MaxDate = MAX(Calendar[Date])
VAR _MinDate = MIN(Calendar[Date])
VAR _PrevStart =
SWITCH(
_Period,
"YTD", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate)-1,1,1),
"L12M", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-25)+1,
"MOM", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-2)+1,
"Date-Filter", DATE(YEAR(_MinDate)-1, MONTH(_MinDate), DAY(_MinDate))
)
VAR _PrevEnd =
SWITCH(
_Period,
"YTD", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate)-1, MONTH(_MaxDate), DAY(_MaxDate)),
"L12M", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-13),
"MOM", EOMONTH(_MaxDate,-1),
"Date-Filter", DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate)-1, MONTH(_MaxDate), DAY(_MaxDate))
)
RETURN
"Previous Period: "
& FORMAT(_PrevStart,"MMM YYYY")
& " - "
& FORMAT(_PrevEnd,"MMM YYYY")

Price_range.dax:
```
VAR _min = [Min_price]
VAR _max = [Max_price]
VAR _min_txt =
SWITCH(
TRUE(),
_min < 1000, FORMAT(_min, "#,0.0"),
_min < 1000000, FORMAT(_min, "#,0,.0K"),
_min < 1000000000, FORMAT(_min, "#,0,,.0M"),
FORMAT(_min, "#,0,,,.0B")
)
VAR _max_txt =
SWITCH(
TRUE(),
_max < 1000, FORMAT(_max, "#,0.0"),
_max < 1000000, FORMAT(_max, "#,0,.0K"),
_max < 1000000000, FORMAT(_max, "#,0,,.0M"),
FORMAT(_max, "#,0,,,.0B")
)
RETURN
IF(
ISFILTERED(Material[Material_description]),
_min_txt & " - " & _max_txt,
"-"
)
```

Single Source %.dax:
VAR ActiveItems =
FILTER(
VALUES('Material'[Material_number]),
CALCULATE([Spend_cy]) > 0
)
VAR SingleSourceItems =
COUNTROWS(
FILTER(
ActiveItems,
CALCULATE(
DISTINCTCOUNT('Fact Procurement'[Invoice_VendorID])
) = 1
)
)
VAR TotalItems =
COUNTROWS(ActiveItems)
RETURN
DIVIDE(SingleSourceItems, TotalItems)

Spend_contri_category.dax:
```
var a=SELECTEDVALUE('Parameter Material Commodity Switch'[Value4])
var _org_para = SELECTEDVALUE('Parameter Hide Show'[Value5])
RETURN
IF(
_org_para = 2,
SWITCH(
a,
"Commodity",
DIVIDE(
[Spend_cy], CALCULATE([Spend_cy],allselected(Commodity)
)),
"Material",
DIVIDE(
[Spend_cy], CALCULATE([Spend_cy],ALLSELECTED(Material)
))
)
,
SWITCH(
a,
"Commodity",
DIVIDE(
[Spend_cy], CALCULATE([Spend_cy],allselected(Commodity), ALLSELECTED(Organization)
)),
"Material",
DIVIDE(
[Spend_cy], CALCULATE([Spend_cy],ALLSELECTED(Material), ALLSELECTED(Organization)
))
))
/*
SWITCH(a,
"Commodity",DIVIDE([Spend_cy],CALCULATE([Spend_cy],all(DIM_BUSINESS_UNIT[Country],DIM_BUSINESS_UNIT[Id_plant_name]),all(Fact_Procurement[CompanyCodeCurrency],Fact_Procurement[TransactionCurrency],Fact_Procurement[Unit]),ALL(DIM_Commodity[Commodity],DIM_Commodity[Commodity_Group],DIM_Commodity[ID_commodity_group_name],DIM_Commodity[ID_commodity_name]))),
"Material",DIVIDE([Spend_cy],CALCULATE([Spend_cy],all(DIM_BUSINESS_UNIT[Country],DIM_BUSINESS_UNIT[Id_plant_name]),all(Fact_Procurement[CompanyCodeCurrency],Fact_Procurement[TransactionCurrency],Fact_Procurement[Unit]),ALL(DIM_MATERIAL[Material_Group_description],DIM_MATERIAL[Material_description],DIM_MATERIAL[ID_material_group_name],DIM_MATERIAL[ID_material_name]))))
*/
```

Spend_py_graph.dax:
VAR _MaxDate = MAX(Calendar[Date])
VAR _MinDate = MIN(Calendar[Date])
VAR _PY_MinDate = DATE(YEAR(_MinDate) - 1, MONTH(_MinDate), DAY(_MinDate))
VAR _PY_MaxDate = DATE(YEAR(_MaxDate) - 1, MONTH(_MaxDate), DAY(_MaxDate))
var a=SELECTEDVALUE('Duration Parameter'[Period])
return SWITCH(a,
"MOM",BLANK(),--[spend_py_mom],
CALCULATE(
[base_usd],
Calendar[Date] >= _PY_MinDate &&
Calendar[Date] <= _PY_MaxDate
))

Tooltip Period Dynamic.dax:
VAR _CurrDate = MAX(Calendar[Date])
VAR _CYMonth =
FORMAT(_CurrDate, "MMM YYYY")
VAR _PYMonth =
FORMAT(DATE(YEAR(_CurrDate)-1, MONTH(_CurrDate), 1), "MMM YYYY")
-- CY Spend scaling
VAR _CY =
[base_usd]
VAR _CYScaled =
SWITCH(
TRUE(),
ABS(_CY) >= 1000000000, FORMAT(_CY/1000000000, "0.0") & " B",
ABS(_CY) >= 1000000,    FORMAT(_CY/1000000, "0.0") & " M",
ABS(_CY) >= 1000,       FORMAT(_CY/1000, "0.0") & " K",
FORMAT(_CY, "0.0")
)
-- PY Spend scaling
VAR _PY =
[Spend_py_graph]
VAR _PYScaled =
SWITCH(
TRUE(),
ABS(_PY) >= 1000000000, FORMAT(_PY/1000000000, "0.0") & " B",
ABS(_PY) >= 1000000,    FORMAT(_PY/1000000, "0.0") & " M",
ABS(_PY) >= 1000,       FORMAT(_PY/1000, "0.0") & " K",
FORMAT(_PY, "0.0")
)
RETURN
"Current Period: " & _CYMonth & " - " & _CYScaled
& UNICHAR(10) &
"Previous Period: " & _PYMonth & " - " & _PYScaled

USD Items in Top 80%.dax:
VAR ItemTable =
ADDCOLUMNS(
VALUES(Material[Material_Group_description]),
"ItemSpend", CALCULATE([usd_cy])
)
VAR RankedTable =
ADDCOLUMNS(
ItemTable,
"Rank", RANKX(ItemTable, [ItemSpend], , DESC)
)
VAR CumTable =
ADDCOLUMNS(
RankedTable,
"CumSpend",
SUMX(
FILTER(RankedTable, [Rank] <= EARLIER([Rank])),
[ItemSpend]
)
)
VAR TotalSpend = [Usd_cy]
RETURN
COUNTROWS(
FILTER(CumTable, [CumSpend] <= 0.8 * TotalSpend)
)

Usd Cumulative Spend material.dax:
VAR CurrentMaterialSpend = [Usd_cy]
RETURN
IF(
CurrentMaterialSpend > 0,
CALCULATE(
[Usd_cy],
FILTER(
ALLSELECTED(Material[Material_description]),
CALCULATE([Usd_cy]) >= CurrentMaterialSpend && CALCULATE([Usd_cy]) > 0
)
),
BLANK()
)

Usd Spend Outside Top 80%.dax:
VAR SupplierTable =
ADDCOLUMNS(
VALUES('Fact Procurement'[Invoice_VendorID]),
"SupplierSpend", CALCULATE([Usd_cy])
)
VAR RankedTable =
ADDCOLUMNS(
SupplierTable,
"Rank", RANKX(SupplierTable, [SupplierSpend], , DESC)
)
VAR CumTable =
ADDCOLUMNS(
RankedTable,
"CumSpend",
SUMX(
FILTER(RankedTable, [Rank] <= EARLIER([Rank])),
[SupplierSpend]
)
)
VAR TotalSpend = [Usd_cy]
RETURN
SUMX(
FILTER(CumTable, [CumSpend] > 0.8 * TotalSpend),
[SupplierSpend]
)

supplier_name_single_source_supplier.dax:
VAR SupplierCount =
CALCULATE(
DISTINCTCOUNT('Fact Procurement'[Invoice_VendorID])
)
VAR VendorID =

SupplierCount = 1,
CALCULATE(
MAX('Fact Procurement'[Invoice_VendorID])
)
)
RETURN
LOOKUPVALUE(
Supplier[Vendor_Name],
Supplier[Vendor_ID], VendorID
)
